2605.10641.title: LLaVA-CKD: Bottom-Up Cascaded Knowledge Distillation for Vision-Language Models
2605.10641.paper_summary: Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are successful in addressing a multitude of vision-language understanding tasks, such as Visual Question Answering (VQA), but their memory and compute requirements remain a concern for practical deployment. A promising class of techniques for mitigating this concern is Knowledge Distillation, where knowledge from a high-capacity Teacher network is transferred to a considerably smaller Student network. However, the capacity gap between the two networks is both a blessing and a curse: the smaller the Student network, the better its efficiency, and the larger the Teacher, the more knowledge it carries; yet, beyond a point, the larger capacity gap between the two leads to worse knowledge transfer. To counter this effect, we propose a bottom-up cascaded knowledge distillation (CKD) framework. Instead of treating knowledge transfer as an activity involving one high-capacity Teacher (or an ensemble of such), inspired by human formal education systems, we introduce one (potentially, more) additional Teacher(s) of intermediate capacity that gradually bring the Student network to the next level, where the next (higher-capacity) Teacher can take over. We provide a theoretical analysis in order to study the effect of cascaded distillation in the generalization performance of the Student. We apply the proposed framework on models build upon the LLaVA methodology and evaluate the derived models on seven standard, publicly available VQA benchmarks, demonstrating their SotA performance.
2605.10641.paper_summary_zh: 大型視覺語言模型（VLMs）在解決多種視覺語言理解任務方面取得了成功，例如視覺問題回答（VQA），但它們的記憶和計算需求仍然是實際部署中的一個顧慮。 一種有前景的技術類別是知識蒸餾，通過將高容量教師網絡的知識轉移到相對較小的學生網絡來減輕這一顧慮。 然而，兩個網絡之間的容量差距既是祝福也是詛咒：學生網絡越小，其效率越高，而教師網絡越大，其所攜帶的知識越多；然而，超過某個點後，兩者之間的容量差距越大，知識轉移的效果就越差。 為了對抗這一效應，我們提出了一種自下而上的級聯知識蒸餾（CKD）框架。 我們不再將知識轉移視為涉及一個高容量教師（或這樣的集合）的活動，而是受到人類正式教育系統的啟發，引入一個（可能更多）中等容量的教師，逐步將學生網絡帶到下一個層次，讓下一個（更高容量的）教師接手。 我們提供了一個理論分析，以研究級聯蒸餾對學生的泛化性能的影響。 我們在基於LLaVA方法論的模型上應用所提出的框架，並在七個標準的公開VQA基準上評估所衍生的模型，展示其最先進的性能。
2605.10641.author: Nikolaos Gkalelis et.al.
